category_sources: source_facts.description says it detects SHA-1 collisions in files; official GitHub README describes a library and command line tool for SHA-1 collision detection.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sha1dc; current_curation.display-name is sha1dc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains command-line usage, library usage, compiling, and project background.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/cr-marcstevens/sha1collisiondetection, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists sha1dcsum tools; source_facts.description and official README identify SHA-1 collision detection and cryptographic hashing behavior.
